sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Twin-Stick Control Scheme
special_mechanics.description: Players move characters with left joystick and shoot with right joystick (multidirectional shooter mechanic)

special_mechanics.name: Bomb Collection and Placement
special_mechanics.description: Players can collect bombs and place them, which explode several seconds later

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay description but no specific physics parameters (movement speeds, gravity values, acceleration, jump mechanics). Total Carnage is a multidirectional shooter, not a platformer, so traditional jump physics may not be primary design focus.
